relay.title: Telemetry Relay — forward live telemetry to a tracker / GCS

cesiumKey.title: 3D Terrain Needs a Cesium Ion Key
cesiumKey.body: The 3D view works without it, but a free Cesium Ion access token enables real world terrain. Paste your token to save it, or skip for now.
cesiumKey.getKey: Get a free token at ion.cesium.com →

sensors.ekfTooltip: EKF estimator health (green = OK, amber = degraded, red = unhealthy)

rc.title: RC Control
rc.platformLocked: Locked to the connected flight controller

manual.title: Manual control (PX4)
manual.comRcInModeHint: PX4 only accepts these inputs when COM_RC_IN_MODE allows a MAVLink/joystick source (not 'RC only'). Set it in PX4/QGC if the sticks don't respond.
manual.buttonsHint: Bind a controller button to a MANUAL_CONTROL button number; map its action in PX4/QGC per vehicle.

rc.connectHint: Connect a joystick or transmitter (USB / gamepad mode).
rc.waitingInput: Waiting for first input — move any control once to initialise.
rc.disengageArmedMsg: Releasing control while armed hands flying back to the flight controller. With the GCS as the only RC source this triggers a failsafe — depending on the FC's configuration it may RTL, land, or disarm (crash). Release anyway?
rc.overrideActive: MSP RC OVERRIDE active — controlling CH1–16
rc.overrideInactive: Override inactive — AUX (CH17+) only. Activate the override switch (TX or via an AUX channel) for full CH1–16 control.
rc.linkSlowTitle: Link too slow for this RC rate
rc.linkSlowHint: RAW_RC at {hz} Hz isn't keeping up ({pct}% of frames late, avg {ms} ms round-trip). Lower the RC rate or the telemetry rates.
rc.moveHint: Move a stick to detect its axes.
rc.pressHint: Press a button to detect it.
rc.controlSoon: Live channel control — coming with mapping.
rc.saveMsg: Overwrite profile "{name}" with the current settings?
rc.deleteMsg: Delete profile "{name}"? The current settings stay loaded.
rc.nameExists: A profile with this name already exists.
rc.lockCriticalHint: A critical mode (ARM / RTH / FAILSAFE) is mapped to an AUX channel you control. AUX channels latch and persist if the GCS link drops — you could lose the ability to disarm or recover. Move it to a standard RC channel (CH1–16) or remove that channel from the profile.
rc.lockNoManualHint: An autonomous mode is on a controlled AUX channel and no MANUAL mode is configured as a fallback. Configure MANUAL on the FC, or remove that channel.
rc.warnGps: {list} — on GCS link loss these can only be overridden by MANUAL or RTH.
rc.rxMspHint: Receiver = MSP: no other RC system may send RC over MSP at the same time while RAW_RC channels are used — otherwise use AUX_RC only.
rc.rxSerialHint: Receiver = SERIAL/NONE: to control sticks (CH1–16) from the GCS, the 'MSP RC OVERRIDE' mode must be active and the channels must be in the override bitmask. Otherwise only AUX channels are available (an AUX channel can activate RC Override).
rc.bitmaskHint: The FC's MSP override bitmask doesn't include all your RAW_RC channels — those wouldn't be overridden. Set it to your configured RAW_RC channels (runtime only, not saved to the FC).
rc.name: Name

safehome.title: Safe Home Manager
safehome.notLoaded: No safehome data — connect to an INAV flight controller.
safehome.connectHint: Connect to INAV to edit safehomes and autoland settings.
safehome.notValidated: INAV {version} is newer than the validated range (7.1–9.1) — autoland config may not match.
safehome.noTerrain: No terrain data for this point — altitudes not converted.
safehome.noApproach: No approach data for this slot.
safehome.saveMsg: Write all safehomes + autoland settings to the FC and save to EEPROM?

control.title: Vehicle Control
control.notConnected: Connect via MAVLink (ArduPilot / PX4) to command the vehicle.
control.rcLockHint: Stick-flown modes need a connected RC transmitter.
control.heading: Heading (°)
control.guidedHint: Enable Guided, then click the map to send the vehicle there.
control.guidedClickHint: Click the map to set the target.
control.setWpHint: Sync the mission with the FC (download/upload) to enable.

action.forceArmHint: Bypasses the FC pre-arm checks — use with care.
action.forceDisarmHint: Forces disarm even if the FC rejected it — use with care.

geozone.title: Geozones
geozone.editLockHint: Unlock the map markers to move/edit zones
geozone.saveMsg: Write all geozones to the flight controller, save to EEPROM and reboot to apply? Geozones only take effect after a reboot, so the FC will restart and the link will drop.
geozone.armedLocked: Geozone editing is disabled while armed.
geozone.errPolyMinVertices: GZ{n}: polygon needs at least 3 vertices
geozone.errSelfIntersect: GZ{n}: polygon edges must not cross
geozone.errAltBand: GZ{n}: upper altitude must be above lower (or 0)
geozone.noTerrain: No terrain data — altitudes not converted
geozone.warnNfzLaunch: Launch/Home is inside a No-Flight-Zone — arming may be blocked here
geozone.warnNfzPath: Mission path may cross a No-Flight-Zone
geozone.warnInclusion: Mission path leaves the inclusion zone
geozone.breachInclusion: Geozone breach — left the flight zone

fence.title: Geofence
fence.saveMsg: Write all fence zones and parameters to the flight controller?
fence.armedLocked: Fence editing is disabled while armed.

rally.title: Rally points
rally.saveMsg: Write all rally points and parameters to the flight controller?
rally.armedLocked: Rally editing is disabled while armed.

about.thirdPartyNote: Bundled components and their licenses. Transitive dependencies carry compatible permissive licenses.

radar.title: Radar
radar.noSystems: No radar systems enabled. Enable one in Settings → Data → Telemetry.
radar.sourcesPlaceholder: Source configuration arrives in a later phase.
radar.alertStage1Desc: Caution when a contact is inside the warn radius (5 km, ±2000 m) and the distance is decreasing.
radar.alertStage2Desc: Predicts the closest point of approach from both 3D tracks (course + climb/sink); warns on a likely conflict (miss < 1000 m / 250 m within 45 s).
radar.ffHint: Kite emulates an INAV FC at your GCS location so the module shares it and relays peers.

video.title: Video
video.noDevices: No camera detected. Connect a camera or USB capture device.

terrain.title: Terrain Analysis
terrain.showMapHint: Compact mode — mirror the chart cursor onto the map
terrain.followHint: Follow the newest live data (zoom only, no pan)
terrain.insufficientWps: Add at least 2 waypoints to analyze
terrain.noTrack: No track loaded — connect or load a flight log
terrain.terrainUnavailable: Terrain data unavailable (offline or out of coverage)
terrain.zoomHint: Wheel: zoom · Drag: pan · Double-click: reset
terrain.rfLosHint: Geometric line-of-sight blocking (naïve). Ignored when Fresnel/diffraction is on.
terrain.rfFresnelHint: Fresnel-zone / knife-edge diffraction loss (realistic obstacle model).
terrain.rfTworayHint: Ground-reflection multipath lobing (nulls and constructive peaks).
terrain.rfRssiHint: Show the logged RSSI line (Track mode; disabled in Waypoint mode or without RSSI data).
terrain.rfLosIgnored: LOS blocking is superseded by Fresnel/diffraction while both are on.
terrain.rfRainbowMsl: The loss rainbow is shown in the MSL view; here only the sightline clearance line is drawn.
terrain.rfNoOrigin: RF analysis needs a launch reference. Connect (uses FC home) or add a Takeoff waypoint to anchor the rays.
terrain.rfDisclaimer: Terrain-only estimate from the launch point — excludes near-field, antenna pattern and aircraft attitude; two-ray null depth is approximate.
terrain.addWpHint: Click the chart to set a marker, then add a waypoint there
terrain.applyConfirm: {changed} waypoint(s) will be changed. Apply to the mission?
terrain.warnWpLimit: Waypoint limit reached — remove a waypoint first.
terrain.warnClimbForced: Climb-angle limit forces some waypoints above the target clearance
terrain.warnUnresolvable: A leg between fixed waypoints stays below clearance

settings.detectLocationHint: Update your location for Night Mode auto (uses OS geolocation)
settings.gcsResetHint: Clear the manual placement and snap back to Your Location
settings.airspaceHintPre: Get a free API key at
settings.directionLinesHint: Heading, course-over-ground and predicted-turn lines at the aircraft on the map
settings.mavlinkFullTelemetryHint: MAVLink only: stream everything the FC sends at its own configured rates (ignores the Attitude/GPS rate settings). For high-bandwidth links and capturing all data in the .tlog. Default off — Kite requests a reduced rate set that fits slow RC links.
settings.continuousRawHint: Records raw data from connect. DB only captures armed segments.
settings.compactDbHint: Defragment the database to reclaim space. Deletes already free space automatically — this is rarely needed.
settings.flightLogHint: Recording starts on ARM and ends on DISARM. Changes apply on next connect.
settings.rateHint: Rate changes take effect on next connect.
settings.cesiumHintPost: — enables 3D terrain. Restart the 3D view after changing.

logbook.title: Flight Logbook
logbook.disabled: Flight logging is disabled. Enable it in Settings and reconnect.
logbook.linkMissionTip: Link the mission currently on the map to this flight
logbook.linkMissionDisabledTip: Load a saved mission on the map first (it must be in the library or a file/FC mission)
logbook.unlinkMission: Unlink this mission from the flight
logbook.selectFlight: Select a flight to view details
logbook.linkableFound:
A matching live recording (Flight #{id}) was found.

Link this blackbox import to the live recording?
logbook.openBattery: Open this battery in the Battery Manager
logbook.openMission: Open this mission in the Mission Manager
logbook.deleteBlackboxWarning: This permanently deletes the stored original blackbox file. The parsed flight stays in the database for replay, but you will no longer be able to export the original file.
logbook.deleteBlackboxSuccess: Original blackbox file deleted ({filename}). The flight stays available for replay.
logbook.importErrors:
Some files could not be imported:
{errors}
logbook.decoderMissingMsg: INAV Blackbox logs need the external 'blackbox_decode' tool, which isn't installed. Download it automatically from the official iNavFlight releases?
logbook.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. Which data do you want to delete?
logbook.deleteConsolidateBattery: Consolidate this flight's battery usage into the battery's lifetime totals

player.logTimeOfDay: Time of day from the log (flight start + elapsed)
player.toggleMission: Show/hide the loaded mission on the map

batch.mixedAltWarn: Absolute altitude change requires the same altitude mode.

mission.clearConfirmMsg: Remove all waypoints of this mission? This can be undone with Ctrl+Z.
mission.emptyEdit: Click on the map to add waypoints
mission.emptyView: No waypoints — enable Edit mode or load mission
mission.heading: Heading
mission.provFcTip: Synced with the connected flight controller
mission.provFileTip: Loaded from / saved to a mission file
mission.provDbTip: Linked to a flight log in the database
mission.trackReplayMsg: Highlight the active waypoint of the loaded mission during this replay? It isn't linked to this log, so the highlight may not match.
mission.trackFlightMsg: Highlight the active waypoint of the loaded mission during this flight? It isn't synced with the flight controller, so the highlight may not match.
mission.linkUpdateMsg: The mission changed during this flight (e.g. a new mission uploaded). Update the recording's linked mission to the current version?
mission.saveLibUpdateMsg: This mission is loaded from the library and was modified. Save it as a new mission, or overwrite the existing one?
mission.saveLibDuplicate: Identical to an existing library mission — linked to that one instead
mission.connMsgFcHas: The flight controller has a mission ({count} WPs). Download it to the map, or upload the current map mission?
mission.connMsgUploadOnly: Upload the current map mission to the flight controller?
mission.clickMarkerHint: Click the marker on the map to edit parameters
mission.statClimbDescent: Total climb / descent across the legs
mission.statTimeTip: Estimated flight time — assumes {speed} where waypoints use the default speed
mission.autopilotLocked: Autopilot system — locked to the connected FC
mission.systemSwitchBody: Switching from {from} to {to} will clear the current mission. Continue?
mission.systemSwitchConnectBody: {to} connected — current {from} mission will be cleared. Switch or disconnect?
mission.systemSwitchChooseBody: What should happen to the current {from} mission?

missionMgr.title: Mission Manager
missionMgr.openFlight: Open this flight in the Logbook
missionMgr.empty: No saved missions yet. Save a mission from the editor, or import a file.
missionMgr.name: Name
missionMgr.dropHint: Drop a .mission or .waypoints file to import
missionMgr.onlyMission: Only .mission and .waypoints files can be imported
missionMgr.systemLocked: Connected to a different autopilot — disconnect to load this mission
missionMgr.importMsg: Import this mission into the library (and load it on the map), or just load it on the map?
missionMgr.replaceMsg: The mission on the map has unsaved changes. Replace it with the selected library mission?
missionMgr.deleteMsg: Delete this mission from the library? This cannot be undone.
missionMgr.deleteMsgLinked: This mission is linked by {count} flight(s). Deleting it will unlink those flights (they keep their telemetry) and remove the mission. Continue?

batteryMgr.addUsageHint: Add consumption to this battery's persistent totals (e.g. prior bench cycles). Values are added, never overwritten.
batteryMgr.exportMsg: Include the linked flights' usage in the export (consolidate), or export only the baseline?
batteryMgr.importConsolidatedInfo: This export folds in the usage of {count} linked flight(s) (baked into the baseline).
batteryMgr.importBaseInfo: This export contains only the baseline (no linked-flight usage).
batteryMgr.importSerialExists: Serial already exists — consolidate/overwrite it, or change the serial to import as a new battery.
batteryMgr.importSerialFree: Serial is free — will be imported as a new battery.
batteryMgr.serialExists: A battery with this serial already exists.
batteryMgr.deleteMsg: Delete this battery from the library?
batteryMgr.deleteMsgLinked: {count} flight(s) reference this battery. They keep their serial and will show "not in library" until a battery with this serial exists again. Delete it?
batteryMgr.label: Label
batteryMgr.openFlight: Open this flight in the Logbook

endFlight.title: Flight ended
endFlight.batteryHint: Serial of the battery you flew
endFlight.batteryNewHint: New serial — you can create this battery after saving.
endFlight.newBatteryMessage: No battery with serial "{serial}" exists yet. Create one now?
endFlight.linkMission: Link the loaded mission to this flight
endFlight.discardConfirm: Discard this recording? It will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
endFlight.notRecordedHint: Recording was off — this is a summary only.

recovery.title: Unfinished recording found
recovery.intro: A recording from a previous session was not closed properly (the app may have crashed or been closed mid-flight).
recovery.introLost: The connection to the aircraft dropped (the serial device was unplugged or the BLE link was lost) while a flight was being recorded. Choose what to do with the recording.
recovery.discardConfirm: Discard this recording? It will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
recovery.waitingBanner: Recording paused — connect to the aircraft to continue the recovered flight.

disconnectArmed.title: Disconnect while recording?
disconnectArmed.intro: The aircraft is armed and a flight is being recorded. Choose what to do with the recording before disconnecting (e.g. you may be changing the COM port or switching to a telemetry link).

survey.title: Survey Pattern
survey.notImplemented: Map visualization & detailed parameters for {shape} are coming next.

arduMission.vehicleLocked: Vehicle type — locked to the connected FC
arduMission.cmdInvalidForVehicle: Command not available for the selected vehicle type
arduMission.cmdInvalidCount: {count, plural, one {# command not valid for this vehicle type} other {# commands not valid for this vehicle type}}

debug.title: 🔧 Debug Monitor
debug.telNoData: No data — waiting for the radio's telemetry stream
debug.mavNoData: No MAVLink messages yet — connect via MAVLink
debug.alNoFix: No UAV fix — conflict alerts inactive
